info.title: ShipHound.Cli
info.description: Deploy .NET and Node.js apps to VPS servers with zero-downtime deployments.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: ShipHound - Deploy React + .NET apps to your VPS

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new ShipHound config file

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build frontend and backend locally (without deploying)

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Set up a VPS for ShipHound deployments

commands.name: diagnose
commands.description: Check VPS configuration and diagnose issues

commands.name: rollback
commands.description: Roll back to a previous deployment
